_publications._publicationTitle: ERK inhibition rescues defects in fate specification of Nf1-deficient neural progenitors and brain abnormalities.

_contextSnippet: The onset of hGFAP-cre expression occurs in ~95% of E12/13 radial glia in the forebrain, thus inactivating Nf1 in both embryonic and adult neural stem cells as well as their differentiated progeny
details: Onset of expression occurs in ~95% of E12/13 radial glia in the forebrain, inactivating Nf1 in both embryonic and adult neural stem cells
